tasks.task_goal: Mix a homemade vinaigrette by combining oil and vinegar in a container
tasks.expected_outcome: A stable, well-emulsified dressing with no visible separation
required_tool_attributes: leak-proof lid to contain liquids during rapid motion
rigid walls to transmit oscillatory force
textured, grippable exterior for secure handling
sufficient headspace to allow fluid sloshing
durable seal that withstands repeated shaking
unconventional_tools: insulated travel coffee mug with a screw-on, leak-proof lid
wide-mouth reusable water bottle with a screw cap (Nalgene-style)
baby bottle with sealing disc and cap

tasks.task_goal: Activate an aerosol spray paint can before painting a metal railing
tasks.expected_outcome: Pigment and propellant are fully mixed, producing an even spray pattern
required_tool_attributes: internal mixing ball to agitate settled pigment
sealed, rigid cylindrical body to handle inertial forces
hand-sized diameter for reliable grip
solvent-resistant interior lining
intact spray valve that remains closed while shaking
unconventional_tools: orbital sander
reciprocating saw
percussion massage gun

tasks.task_goal: Reset an old-style mercury-in-glass thermometer to below room temperature
tasks.expected_outcome: Mercury column drops so the next reading starts low and is accurate
required_tool_attributes: sealed glass tube to contain the liquid metal
dense mercury column responsive to inertial flicking
elongated stem to generate acceleration when shaken
grippable end section for control
sufficient structural integrity to withstand repeated motion
unconventional_tools: salad spinner
tube sock
lanyard

tasks.task_goal: Create a snowfall effect in a decorative display
tasks.expected_outcome: Glitter or faux snow swirls dramatically and then slowly settles
required_tool_attributes: sealed, liquid-filled chamber
grippable base for secure handling
shatter-resistant glass or acrylic
watertight seals to prevent leaks
free internal particles that respond to oscillation
unconventional_tools: double-walled glitter tumbler (with floating glitter between walls)
liquid glitter phone case
glitter-filled sensory wand

tasks.task_goal: Blend protein powder with water for a post-workout drink
tasks.expected_outcome: Smooth, lump-free shake with fully dissolved powder
required_tool_attributes: leak-proof cap to contain vigorous motion
internal mixing ball or baffles to break clumps
rigid body to transmit shaking energy
contoured, grippable exterior
adequate headspace for fluid movement
unconventional_tools: cobbler-style cocktail shaker
mason jar with screw-on lid
insulated travel coffee tumbler with a screw-top lid

tasks.task_goal: Mix and chill a martini
tasks.expected_outcome: Properly integrated, well-chilled cocktail with slight aeration
required_tool_attributes: tight-fitting pieces to prevent leaks
cold-resistant stainless steel construction
balanced mass for efficient oscillation
textured surface for secure grip when wet
sufficient volume to accommodate ice and liquid motion
unconventional_tools: stainless steel travel coffee mug with a screw-on lid
wide-mouth stainless steel water bottle with a screw cap
vacuum-insulated stainless steel food jar (wide-mouth thermos)

tasks.task_goal: Evenly dust a cake with powdered sugar
tasks.expected_outcome: A uniform, clump-free layer of powdered sugar over the cake
required_tool_attributes: fine mesh that releases powder under vibration
rigid frame to maintain mesh tension during shaking
handle for controlled oscillation
bowl-shaped cavity to hold powder while moving
light but sturdy construction for rapid motion
unconventional_tools: tea infuser ball (mesh sphere with clamp and small handle)
reusable metal pour-over coffee filter cone
stainless steel mesh sink strainer

tasks.task_goal: Remove loose dust and crumbs from a small entryway rug
tasks.expected_outcome: Visible dust and debris are released from the fibers
required_tool_attributes: durable fabric that tolerates abrupt motion
reinforced edges for gripping
sufficient mass to build inertial waves

tasks.task_goal: Erase the drawing on a classic screen toy

rigid rectangular frame to withstand shaking
grippable sides for controlled motion
internal particles that redistribute under oscillation

tasks.task_goal: Extend print quality by redistributing toner in a fading cartridge
tasks.expected_outcome: Toner is spread evenly, temporarily improving print density

integrated handholds for safe grip
internal baffles or geometry that respond to shaking
rigid casing to endure oscillatory forces

tasks.task_goal: Coat chicken pieces evenly with seasoned flour without making a mess

tasks.task_goal: Activate a glow stick for nighttime visibility on a hike

tasks.task_goal: Resuspend a pediatric antibiotic that has settled between doses
